title: HRIS Customer Implementation Specialist
description:
Workstream is a mission-driven company building the all-in-one HR, payroll, and hiring platform for managing the hourly workforce. There are 2.7 billion hourly workers, making up 80% of the global workforce, but this market has been heavily underserved by technology and deserves better. Workstream has been purpose-built for the hourly workforce from day one so that these businesses and their employees can thrive.



Our customers include leading brands from multiple sectors, including Burger King, Carl's Jr./Hardee's, IHOP, KFC, and Culvers. We are a high growth series B company and quickly expanding our product portfolio to deliver on our vision. We are backed by legendary VCs and industry experts like Founders Fund, BOND, and Coatue.



Values



Here’s our Company Values and we’d love to have individuals who can be a culture add to our team!



What We Offer



Permanently Remote

Pay wired directly to your bank account

$50 monthly Medical Stipend

13th Month Pay

Performance based bonuses

Flexible PTO

Enjoy company time off during some of the major US Holidays

Career fast track for performers and internal mobility

Learn from a team of Stanford, MIT, Google and Harvard alumni



Grow With Us



We are looking for a full-time, dedicated, and passionate HRIS Customer Implementation Specialist to join our growing team. This person will be a core member of our customer success team, and will be well-positioned to succeed -  the entire company from sales, customer success, product, and engineering are all aligned to make sure our customers are successful!



You will primarily lead new client onboarding for SMB clients for their first 30 days. To do this, you have empathy for people, can explain complex concepts clearly and concisely both via
 and via video calls, are tech-savvy, and have the ability to ask probing questions. You will be measured on how successful clients get onboarded to Workstream via a balanced scorecard.



This is a remote position and based in the Philippines. We will have occasional gatherings of the entire team in Metro Manila (a few times a year). You are expected to work Philippines night shift, to support US based customers. This is a customer-facing role, where you will be on video and voice calls Zoom calls (video on) with customers daily. 



Day In The Life



-Run scaled, defined implementations with our SMB HRIS customers.

-Own the implementation process end-to-end for assigned accounts which include: successful implementation and training of the software to drive adoption by new clients

-Lead multiple implementation calls daily with new customers

-Setting accurate expectations with clients and internal stakeholders 

-Escalating high-severity requests or issue escalations as needed

-Participating in cross-functional groups to establish enhancements to communications, tools, and products

-Be an expert in Workstream, so you can guide new users and answer their questions

-Keep track of client activity, notes, and next steps clearly in our success software

-Incorporate internal and external feedback to drive continuous improvements in the onboarding process

-Learn from your assigned clients to build and maintain templates



Who You Are



-Minimum of 1-2 years of experience in customer-facing roles and preferably have worked at software, restaurant technology, or HR technology companies.

-Can adapt and remain flexible with ever-changing processes

--Willing to roll up your sleeves and get your hands dirty attitude; no job is too big or too small.

-You excel under high pressure in fast-paced environments with competing priorities.

-Top-tier communication skills across
, phone, and video conferencing. 

-Ability to both interpret customer questions and provide pointed answers tailored to their needs. 

-Ability to capture customer feedback and recognize key areas for improvement in our internal processes.

-High-speed and stable primary and backup internet connection (at least 20 Mbps). Please note that we will require you to submit a document showing a screenshot of your speed test results for your main and backup connections.

-Must be willing to attend occasional meetings in Metro Manila



Please submit your application here:

title: Quality Analyst
description:
About Us: We are a company based in the United Arab Emirates, with many international Clientele. You will be working remotely with our head office in the UAE and our Clients around the world, depending on which division we hire you for.



Job Description:

1) Work from home-remote work

2) Full time work-you cannot hold another job during our working hours. This is a professional position which requires dedication and there is room for advancement and growth. You will be in communication during working hours with our team and our partners.

3) Payment will be based on experience. Commissions are also available based on performance.

4) You will work from your computer and phone to review and ensure the quality of marketing content before uploading it to the following platforms: Instagram,
, LinkedIn, YouTube, TikTok, and Dropbox.

5) Monitor sub-contractors, ensuring deadlines are met, responsiveness is maintained, and quality standards are achieved.

6) Communicate with corresponding contacts to align goals and meet work expectations.

7) Perform at a high level in writing viral and engaging content scripts, thoroughly reviewing and ensuring video quality, and creating high-quality designs using tools such as Canva.

8) Research and ideation of content that will help promote the Client and create engagement. This will factor into your commissions.

9) After you pass the initial training period, you will be given a 1-year, renewable contract. We hope to work with you for many years to come. We are looking for someone who wants long term stability.



Skills Needed:

1) Proven experience as a Quality Analyst, QA Specialist, or similar role (preferably in marketing or digital content).

2) Strong organizational and time-management skills, and excellent communication and interpersonal abilities.

3) High attention to detail with a strong commitment to meeting deadlines, and the ability to work both independently and as part of a team.

4) University education preferred.

5) Excellent use of computers and software like MS word, Google sheets, etc.



HOW TO APPLY:

Please send (1) your CV/resume and (2) your portfolio/work samples/metrics to 
 subject should be as follows: Quality Analyst - [Your Full Name]



Once your application is reviewed, you will be contacted via
 about a video or phone interview. After that, you will be notified whether or not you got the position.



Please do not send messages through this application as it is easier for us to organize things via
. If you have any inquiries, please send an
.



Thank you for your application and we hope you are chosen for an interview to join our team!

title: Short-form Video editor - Meta ads
description:
OVERVIEW: 

We are looking for a talented DTC Video Editor with experience in graphic design, storytelling, and short-form ads.



Our brands focus on consumer products and viral-style social media content. Your role will be to turn raw clips into high-performing ad creatives and engaging short videos (10–40 seconds).



You should understand how to capture attention in the first 5 seconds, structure a viral video, and optimize for storytelling paid ads.



RESPONSIBILITY:



Edit short-form videos (10–30 seconds) for
 Ads, TikTok Ads, and Reels

Create strong hooks and storytelling structures

Add captions, sound effects, and engaging text overlays

Use AI tools to speed up editing and content creation

Create multiple variations of ad creatives for testing

Turn raw footage into UGC-style ads

Create graphics or elements using AI

Follow current social media and ad creative trends



REQUIREMENTS:



Experience editing ad creatives of DTC brands 

Strong understanding of storytelling and hooks

Experience editing short-form videos for ads

Experience with AI Graphic design

Ability to create captions and engaging overlays

Good written and spoken English





WE PROVIDE:



Clear instructions and creative direction

Access to tools and assets

Long-term opportunity if performance is strong





WORKLOAD: 

Part-time or Full-time depending on experience



HOW TO APPLY:



Links to ads or videos you edited

What AI tools you use for editing

Your hourly rate

Please start your application with the word ‘Clean’

A short explanation of how you create a strong hook for a video ad

title: Home-based Video Data Contributor (Part-time)
description:
Workstream is a mission-driven company building the all-in-one HR, payroll, and hiring platform for managing the hourly workforce. There are 2.7 billion hourly workers, making up 80% of the global workforce, but this market has been heavily underserved by technology and deserves better. Workstream has been purpose-built for the hourly workforce from day one so that these businesses and their employees can thrive.



Our customers include leading brands from multiple sectors, including Burger King, Carl's Jr./Hardee's, IHOP, KFC, and Culvers. We are a high growth series B company and quickly expanding our product portfolio to deliver on our vision. We are backed by legendary VCs and industry experts like Founders Fund, BOND, and Coatue.



???? Help Shape the Future of Robotics & Earn Income



We are looking for paid participants to record videos of everyday activities while wearing a head-mounted camera. Your recordings will help robotics systems learn to perceive, understand, and interact with real-world environments.



You’ll record yourself doing tasks you already do in daily life, such as:



-Folding laundry

-Preparing or cooking food

-Cleaning, tidying, or organizing items

-Rearranging or sorting objects

-Participants may or may not be assigned specific tasks, depending on project needs.



If you’re detail-oriented, comfortable performing everyday tasks, and want to earn additional income while contributing to cutting-edge robotics research, we’d love to work with you!



???? What to Expect:



Weekly footage goal: Capture at least 10 hours of clear, intentional arm, hand, and finger movements interacting with objects (e.g., folding clothes, using a screwdriver). Avoid low-value activities such as typing, using your phone, or sitting idle.



Uploads & quality checks: Upload videos to Google Drive on time, perform basic quality checks, and track your daily filming progress.



Compensation: Paid based on total usable footage 

Unusable footage includes: Dark videos, footage showing only fingers (not full hands and arms), idle activities (watching TV, using phone, driving), or videos capturing personal information.

Project duration: Month-to-month, giving you flexibility.

Film as much high-quality, task-specific footage as you want—earn extra income while completing everyday tasks!



???? Simple Assessment

As part of the application process, candidates are asked to complete a short video task:



Record a 2-minute video of a simple task (e.g., folding clothes, cleaning, or organizing) using your phone’s wide camera (0.5x) at 1080p / 30 FPS. Do not show your face and no voice is required.Please make sure there is good lighting and keep your hands visible.You will be asked to provide the Google Drive link in the screening question—make sure it is set to “Anyone with the link can view.”



This assessment helps us confirm filming quality, attention to instructions, and ability to upload videos correctly.



???? Day in the Life

Wear your phone via a head strap.

Film tasks following best practices.

Ensure successful recordings before uploading to Drive.

Get paid!



Example tasks:



-Picking up, placing, and organizing objects

-Sorting items by size, color, or category

-Using simple tools (screwdriver, cloth, utensils)

-Cleaning or wiping surfaces

-Assembling/disassembling simple objects

-Reaching and placing objects at varying distances

Sample footage: 



?? Compliance & Participation Requirements



To ensure project success, participants are expected to:



Meet the required filming hours.

Follow all submission guidelines.

We encourage open communication if you encounter challenges, so we can provide support. Repeated failure to meet requirements without a valid and communicated reason may result in termination of participation and contract.



??????? Who You Are



Own a smartphone with a wide camera (0.5x zoom) capable of 1080p/30 FPS

Have access to a computer or laptop and a stable internet connection to upload videos to Google Drive

Able to follow detailed instructions carefully

Comfortable performing light physical tasks (standing, reaching, grasping objects)

Able to move naturally, slowly, and deliberately during recordings

Knowledgeable in uploading, organizing, and managing video files on Google Drive

???? Compensation

$2 USD/hour for the first 10 hours (initial period)

$3 USD/hour for all subsequent approved footage that meets quality standards



???? Bonuses



$10 USD headgear reimbursement upon completion of the first 10 hours (regardless of approval)

$10 USD one-time bonus upon completion of the next 10 hours of approved footage

$20 USD one-time bonus upon reaching 50 hours of approved footage within the first month



???? Payment Terms



Compensation is based solely on approved and qualified footage

Payments are processed via Deel on a monthly basis and released at the end of each month

Footage must be submitted and approved within the applicable payout cycle to be included in that month’s payment

Participants whose start date falls on or after the second week of the month will receive their first payment in the subsequent month’s payout cycle



???? Who Can Apply:



We value participants from all backgrounds. All qualified candidates will be considered regardless of race, color, religion, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, national origin, disability, age, or veteran status.



Even if you’re unsure whether you meet every requirement, we encourage you to apply! 



Please submit you application here:

title: **Virtual Assistant (Full-Time) AIRBNB – Evening & Weekend Support (PST)**
description:
**Virtual Assistant (Full-Time) – Evening & Weekend Support (PST)**



Company: Haven by Design Stays

Location: Remote (Philippines preferred)

Schedule: Full-Time | U.S. Pacific Time (Start 4:30 PM PST weekdays + Saturday & Sunday required)



About the Role: We’re a growing Airbnb short-term rental business looking for a reliable Virtual Assistant to handle guest communication and basic operations support during evenings and weekends. You’ll be the main point of contact for guests—helping with questions, check-ins, and resolving issues to ensure a smooth, 5-star experience.



Key Responsibilities: Respond to guest messages (Airbnb, VRBO, etc.), send check-in/check-out instructions, handle guest issues and coordinate with cleaners/maintenance, monitor reservations and daily activity, and keep communication clear, friendly, and timely.



Requirements: Strong written English, reliable and responsive, detail-oriented, able to work evenings and weekends (PST hours), customer service experience preferred, Airbnb/STR experience is a plus.



Pay: $3–$4/hour depending on experience, long-term opportunity with growth potential.



How to Apply: Send a short intro about yourself, share relevant experience, confirm your availability for PST evenings and weekends, and answer this: “Hi, we just arrived and can’t find parking—can you help?” Include the word “HAVEN” at the top of your application.



We’re looking for someone dependable, kind, and proactive who wants to grow with us.

title: Part-Time WordPress + Shopify Developer
description:
## What you'll do

- WordPress custom development — custom themes and child themes, custom Gutenberg blocks, ACF Pro field setup, WooCommerce template and checkout customization, performance tuning, and core/plugin update management with regression testing.

- Shopify custom development — Liquid theming, theme customization, custom sections and blocks, Shopify app configuration (bundles, rewards, reviews, subscriptions), metafield setup, Lighthouse and Core Web Vitals optimization.

- Integrations and APIs — Klaviyo, Mailchimp, ConvertKit, Brevo, Kit (embeds, API, webhooks), custom forms and quiz backends, reviews integrations, GA4/GTM, affiliate platforms, custom webhook listeners.

- Technical maintenance — plugin conflicts, console errors, broken redirects, form failures,
 deliverability (SPF, DKIM, DMARC), SSL, DNS, backup verification.



## Tech stack

**WordPress**

- Kadence (plugin and theme)

- Beaver Builder and Beaver Themer

- ACF Pro

- RankMath

- WooCommerce

- HTML, CSS, PHP, JavaScript fundamentals

- Local development with DevKinsta (preferred) or similar

- Headless WordPress (optional, a plus)



**Shopify**

- Liquid theming experience

- Theme customization (sections, blocks, theme editor compatibility)

- Shopify app configuration (bundles, rewards, reviews, subscription apps)

- Headless Shopify (optional, a plus)



**Good to have**

- Sureforms / Surecart

- Shopify Functions or Checkout UI Extensions

- Klaviyo flow setup beyond the embed

- Subscription or membership platforms (Recharge, Skio, MemberPress, Outseta)



## How to apply



Send a short message that includes:



1. A 2–3 sentence intro about yourself and your dev background

2. Up to two case studies of projects you built or contributed to. For each: live URL, what you specifically built (be honest about you vs. team), the tech stack used, and one technical problem you solved.

3. A link to a public GitHub or GitLab profile if you have one

4. Your preferred engagement type (hourly, monthly, or per-project) and your rate

5. Your typical working hours



Applications missing case studies or specific role details won't move forward. Final candidates will do a short paid trial task on a real (small, low-risk) ticket before any long-term commitment.

title: eCommerce Product Data Operator
description:
Hi there,



We are an Australian-based industrial 3D printing supplier looking for a Product Data Operator to manage and maintain a structured Shopify catalogue.



This is a data accuracy and operations role, not a marketing, design, or content role.



You will work with supplier feeds, product data, and Shopify exports to ensure our catalogue is clean, accurate, and scalable.



Rate & Hours



Rate: $4–$6 USD/hour (based on experience and accuracy)

Hours: 10–20 hours per week (trial, with potential to increase)



This role begins with a paid test task and short trial period.



Core Responsibilities

Map supplier SKUs to Shopify products and variants (exact match only)

Maintain and populate structured product metafields based on defined rules (no guessing or free text)

Validate product, inventory, and supplier data

Prepare and clean CSV files for Shopify (Matrixify preferred)

Identify and flag duplicates, mismatches, or missing products

Execute tasks from defined queues (no independent decision-making)

Rules (Non-Negotiable)



You must follow these rules at all times:



Do NOT guess SKU matches

Do NOT rewrite product names or titles

Do NOT create new products without approval

Do NOT modify pricing or product structure

Do NOT enter free-text values into structured metafields

Flag any uncertainty clearly



Accuracy is more important than speed.



Requirements

Experience working with structured product attributes or metafields (Shopify or similar)

Experience managing large product catalogues (1000+ SKUs preferred)

Strong understanding of SKUs, variants, and structured product data

Advanced Excel / Google Sheets skills

High attention to detail and consistency

Ability to follow strict processes without deviation

Preferred (Nice to Have)

Shopify experience (products, variants, CSV imports)

Matrixify (Excelify) experience

Experience working with supplier product feeds

Inventory / operations background

Test Task (Required)



Shortlisted candidates will complete a paid test task:



Map 20 SKUs from supplier data to Shopify

Identify exact matches only

Flag uncertain or missing items

Populate required metafields using provided rules

How to Apply



Please include:



A short explanation of how you handle SKU matching

Your experience with product or inventory data

Confirmation that you understand and will follow the rules above

Final Note



We are not looking for a general VA or SEO specialist.

We are looking for a reliable operator who can execute structured data work accurately and consistently.

title: Amazon PPC/Ads Manager (Remote)
description:
We are a dynamic and growing e-commerce agency specializing in online retail. We manage multiple brands on Amazon and are looking for a dedicated Amazon Ads (PPC) Manager to join our team. This is a full time role. 



Responsibilities:



Develop, implement, and optimize Amazon PPC campaigns (Sponsored Products, Sponsored Brands, and Sponsored Display).

Conduct keyword research and competitive analysis to enhance campaign performance.

Monitor and analyze ad performance metrics, adjusting bids and strategies accordingly.

Collaborate with the design and product teams to align ad strategies with overall business goals.

Stay updated on Amazon’s advertising platform updates and industry trends.

Generate detailed reports on campaign performance and provide strategic recommendations.





Requirements:



3+ years of experience managing Amazon PPC campaigns.

Proven ability to optimize campaigns for ACOS, ROAS, and overall profitability.

Experience with bulk file management and automation tools is a plus.

Data-driven mindset with excellent analytical and problem-solving skills.

Strong communication and reporting abilities.





Benefits:



Fully Remote Role

A dynamic and supportive work environment.

Opportunities for professional growth and development.

The chance to work with a passionate and driven team.

title: Experienced Technical VA
description:
**** DON'T JUST APPLY. READ EVERYTHING AND MAKE SURE YOU'RE A FIT.



Role Type

Expert Technical VA — Senior Level



Title

AI & Automation Systems Specialist

Seniority: Senior (with fast-track to Lead Tech / Head of Automation)



Mission of the Role

To architect, implement, and maintain world-class AI systems — including Voice AI, SDR automation, lead follow-up systems, CRM workflows, data syncing, and multichannel outreach — that significantly improve client communication, efficiency, and revenue.



BEFORE YOU GO ANY FURTHER. UNLESS YOU MEET THE REQUIREMENTS - DON'T APPLY.



Technical Communication:

- Advanced English writing and speaking - we can't let language barrier to be an issue.

- Able to translate technical info for non-technical terms.



This Role Is NOT a Fit If Any of These Apply:

- Poor communication: You are slow to respond, unclear in updates, fail to confirm receipt, or leave people guessing about status or next steps.

- Unreliable with time: You show up late, miss meetings or deadlines, or treat timelines and working hours as flexible.

- Inconsistent availability: You cannot maintain a stable schedule, disappear without notice, or frequently change availability.

- Lack of ownership: You need to be chased to complete work, shift responsibility, or see work as not a priority

- Excuse-driven execution: You miss deadlines, blame circumstances, or explain why something didn’t happen instead of solving the problem.

- Reactive mindset: You wait to be told what to do, don’t flag issues early, or fail to think ahead about risks and improvements.

- Low attention to detail: You cut corners, skip steps, avoid testing, or submit work without proper review.

- Resistance to structure: You dislike SOPs, avoid documentation, or push back against company policies.

- Defensive to feedback: You take correction personally, resist accountability, or fail to apply feedback quickly.

- Self-focused over team-focused: You prioritize personal convenience over team success, client outcomes, or long-term trust.



ONLY Proceed if ALL of These Apply:



- Clear, proactive communicator: You respond quickly during working hours, confirm receipt, provide concise status updates, and communicate next steps without being asked.

- Highly reliable with time: You show up early or on time, respect meetings and deadlines, and treat commitments as non-negotiable.

- Consistently available and dependable: You maintain a stable schedule, communicate changes in advance, and ensure coverage and continuity.

- Strong ownership mindset: You take full responsibility for outcomes, follow through without reminders, and see work through to completion.

- Solution-oriented executor: When obstacles arise, you propose solutions, adjust plans, and keep progress moving—no excuses.

- Proactive and forward-thinking: You anticipate needs, flag risks early, suggest improvements, and think two steps ahead.

- Detail-oriented and quality-driven: You double-check your work, test before delivery, and take pride in accuracy and polish.

- System-first thinker: You follow SOPs, document processes, improve workflows, and leave clear handoffs so nothing depends on you alone.

- Coachability and maturity: You receive feedback professionally, implement it quickly, and continuously raise your standards.

- Team-first, mission-driven: You care about client outcomes, team success, and long-term trust more than personal convenience.



Key Responsibilities

AI System Architecture & Implementation

- Build advanced AI workflows using N8N, Make, Zapier, GoHighLevel, OpenAI API, and LangChain-style logic.

- Configure AISDRs, voice agents (RetellAi), and multi-step automations that handle inbound, outbound, nurturing, qualification, booking, and follow-up.



You will ensure every client’s system is:

- fast

- reliable

- error-free

- scalable

- and fully documented



Workflow Design & Mapping

Convert messy client processes into clean, automated systems (lead > follow-up > qualification > appointment > CRM sync).



Voice AI & Phone Automation

- Build and deploy AI voice agents using:

- Twilio / SIP integrations

- RetellAi, Whisper, ElevenLabs, or other LLM voice stacks

- Configure pre-call SMS flows, voi
 detection, call intelligence, routing, and appointment booking.



Data Integration & System Syncing

- Connect CRMs (Zoho, GHL, HubSpot, 
) with databases, Google Sheets, APIs, and 3rd-party tools.

- Ensure clean data flow and real-time updates between all systems.

- Apollo Auto Data Enrichment



API Connections & Webhooks

- Build and maintain API-based automations using HTTP requests, custom headers, authentication, and JSON parsing.



Client Fulfillment

- Execute high-quality technical builds from project briefs, client onboarding, or system audits.

- Provide timeline updates, project progress, and clear communication.



Quality Assurance

- Test every workflow end-to-end to ensure accuracy.

- Run failure scenarios, edge cases, and stress tests before launch.



Troubleshooting & Optimization

- Diagnose issues fast, without hand-holding.

- Propose automation upgrades and system optimizations proactively.



Documentation

- Create clean SOPs, diagrams, flowcharts, and configuration documentation for all automations.



Client Communication

- Join calls when needed to gather requirements, demo builds, or explain technical setups.



Continuous Learning

- Stay ahead of emerging AI tools, automation frameworks, and voice technologies.



Essential Qualifications / Skills (Must-Haves)



Automation Expertise = MUST be an EXPERT. Advanced knowledge.



Strong, provable capability with:

- N8N (expert level)

- RetellAI

- Zapier

- Make (Integromat)

- GoHighLevel (GHL)

- OpenAI API

- ChatGPT Assistants, embeddings, prompt workflows

- Webhooks & API integrations

- Google Sheets automations & App Script



Voice AI Experience

At least one of:

- RetellAI

- Twilio Programmable Voice

- ElevenLabs

- AI call routing

- AI appointment-setting workflows



Advanced Workflow Logic

- Ability to map complex processes and automate them cleanly.

- Can work with multi-branch logic, queues, if/then rules, and layered automation.



Professional Attributes

- Highly accountable

- Fast problem-solver

- Organized & detail-driven

- Reliable deadlines

- Understands business ROI



Preferred Qualifications / Skills (Nice-to-Haves)

- Experience building AISDRs

- LangChain, ReAct agents, or custom AI pipelines

- Backend logic (JavaScript, Python, Node)

- Twilio Studio & call flows





Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)

- Quality: Number of post-deployment issues

- Speed: Days from project start ? launch

- Reliability: On-time delivery rate

- Client Satisfaction: Feedback & retention

- System Performance: Speed, accuracy, uptime

- Documentation Quality: Completeness of SOPs



Success Measures

- Clients get automated systems delivered on time

- Zero critical automation failures

- Systems run reliably with clear documentation

- Clients experience increased bookings, speed, and conversion

- Ai Pro Partner can scale faster with clean workflows



Compensation

$TBD/hour (USD) to start — depending on:

- technical level

- voice AI experience

- automation depth

- API integration skills

Performance-based raises + bonuses for major client wins.



Contract Type

Full-Time within 30–90 days

Flexible schedule

Must overlap with U.S. business hours (EST–PST)



Location

Global, remote

Must have reliable internet, equipment, and English fluency.



Growth Path

Stage 1: Senior Tech VA / Automation Specialist

Stage 2: Lead Implementer (owns major client systems)

Stage 3: Head of AI Systems (manages multiple implementers)



Ideal Candidate Traits

Obsessed with technical builds

Takes pride in clean automations

Proactive communicator

Thinks in systems and workflows

Quick learner

Reliable and detail-driven

Sees client success as personal success



Example Tech Stack You’ll Use

Core / Automations:

N8N, Make, Zapier, GoHighLevel, ChatGPT, OpenAI API, Google Suite, API tools, JSON, Webhooks

Voice AI:

RetellAi, Twilio, ElevenLabs

Automation & Ops:

Slack, Instantly.ai,



NEXT STEPS:



***IF YOU CAN'T FOLLOW DIRECTIONS, YOU'RE NOT A FIT.



1. Send us message telling us why you're a fit.

2. Confirm that you have expertise (not novice or average experience) with the tech stacks shared on this job description.

3. Send a LOOM video, directed to specifically (Ai Prop Partner) showing examples of automations you've created, explain in a technical terms and then explain in lames terms. (DON'T SEND US THE GENERIC ONE YOU SEND EVERYONE ELSE)

Continuous Learning

Essential Qualifications / Skills (Must-Haves)

Advanced Workflow Logic

Professional Attributes

Preferred Qualifications / Skills (Nice-to-Haves)

Location

title: Expert US Executive Assistant to the CEO (50 hours a week)
description:
About the Role

Cross-Team Coordination

Administrative Support



Maintain and optimize the CEO's calendar, prioritizing key meetings and deadlines.

Coordinate internal and external meetings across multiple time zones.

Send reminders, prepare meeting briefs, and manage scheduling conflicts.

Written and Internal Communications

s, newsletters, blog posts, and internal memos.

Qualifications

title: Registered Nurse – Medical Virtual Assistant (PS Suite|Canada)
description:
Registered Nurse – Virtual Medical Office Assistant

Canadian Family Medicine Clinic | Long-Term | Work From Home

Flexible Evening Shift — Not Full Graveyard



We are a family medicine clinic in Ontario, Canada seeking a licensed or former Registered Nurse in the Philippines to join our team as a Virtual Medical Office Assistant. This is a long-term, full-time, work-from-home role supporting our physicians and patients.

A big reason to apply: we offer a humane schedule. Unlike most US medical VA roles that demand a full graveyard shift, we have enough asynchronous work that we can build a shift ending by 1–2 AM PHT. You sleep overnight. You see your family in the evening.



Prior experience with PS Suite (TELUS PS Suite) EMR is a major advantage. This the EMR that we use.

We specifically want a nurse because your clinical background matters. You will be screening lab results, speaking with patients, and helping our doctors work more efficiently — this goes well beyond typical admin work.



What You Will Do (Starting Responsibilities)

- Make outbound phone calls to patients for appointment booking, result notifications, follow-up confirmations, and physician instructions

- Triage incoming patient messages and calls, prioritizing by clinical urgency

- Action messages and directions from our physicians (scheduling follow-ups, preparing referrals, patient callbacks)

- Manage incoming faxes — receive lab results, specialist reports, and hospital discharge summaries, upload to the correct patient chart in PS Suite, and tag appropriately

- Review incoming lab and imaging results, and flag abnormal or critical findings for the physician's immediate attention



Growth Opportunities

As trust and competency are established, your role and compensation will expand. Future responsibilities may include:



- Preventive care outreach (cancer screening, diabetes follow-ups, chronic disease management)

- Prescription refill coordination

- Specialist referral management and tracking

- OHIP billing support (we will train you)

- Medical aesthetic administrative help (Botox injection clinic is on-site)

- Training junior tea
mbers as we grow



We invest in people who invest in us. Compensation increases with expanded scope and proven reliability.

Work Schedule — Flexible, Not Full Graveyard

This role requires partial overlap with Ontario business hours for live patient phone calls. A lot of work — fax filing, lab result review, end-of-day message handling — can be done asynchronously outside overlap hours.



Our proposed shift:

Summer (March to November): 5:00 PM – 1:00 AM Philippine Time

Winter (November to March): 6:00 PM – 2:00 AM Philippine Time

This gives us consistent morning overlap with clinic (approximately 5 AM – 1 PM Eastern Time year-round)

We can discuss this more in-depth as we get to know you!



Required Qualifications

- Registered Nurse (PRC license, active or inactive) - BSN graduate

- Excellent spoken and written English with a clear, neutral accentyou will be calling Canadian patients, including seniors

- Strong clinical judgment to recognize abnormal results and urgent situations

- Reliable high-speed internet (minimum 25 Mbps), backup internet preferred

- Quiet, private home workspace - patient confidentiality and clear phone calls

- Functional laptop or desktop with a quality headset



Major Plus (Please Mention in Your Application)

- PS Suite / TELUS PS Suite EMR experience — this is a big advantage and we will prioritize applicants with it

- Previous experience working with a Canadian, US, UK, or Australian clinic

- Familiarity with Canadian healthcare terminology and OHIP

- Experience in family medicine, internal medicine, or outpatient care



What We Offer

- Monthly salary based on experience, English proficiency, and PS Suite familiarity. Higher end reserved for candidates with prior Western clinic and PS Suite experience. Will vary from posted amount if you are a highly competent applicant

- Appealing evening shift schedule, not a full graveyard shift

- Paid training period

- Paid Philippine holidays and agreed leave

- Long-term stability with a growing family medicine practice

- Genuine career and pay growth as responsibilities expand beyond this starting scope

- Supportive, respectful team culture



How to Apply - Please send:

- Your CV/resume in PDF format

- A short cover message (written by you, not a template or AI) explaining your nursing and medical background, why this role interests you, and your English language experience. Between 250 and 500 words.

- A 60-second voice recording introducing yourself in English (any topic — we use this to assess spoken English quickly)

- Your expected monthly salary in USD

- Confirmation that the proposed evening shift works for you

- If you have PS Suite experience, please state this clearly at the top of your application



Applications without a voice recording will not be reviewed. Thank you and we look forward to hearing from you!

title: HR Manager
description:
HR Manager (Hiring, Strategy & Retention) 

 

*** Please include your resume with the number 2100 as the subject header, along with outlining your relevant experience and qualifications to be considered for an interview. *** 



About the Role: We are hiring an HR Manager to lead human talent and scale people solutions at PTOE Global Solutions, a fast-growing solutions company helping entrepreneurs and businesses run and scale with clarity, structure, and systems. 



This is not a corporate HR or high-volume recruiting role. 



This is for a builder and people architect who wants to take ownership of the entire talent lifecycle and help scale a global, remote-first business by finding, keeping, and growing the best talent in the world. 



You will work directly with the founder (Chief Stewardship Officer) to turn growth vision into talent systems, high-retention structures, and measurable culture results. 



Core Mission: Build and operate scalable talent solutions that ensure we hire the right people and keep them engaged for the long term. 



What You’ll Be Responsible For: 

Hiring & Acquisition  

Own end-to-end recruitment for specialized global roles (Hiring). 



-Build proactive talent pipelines and ensure a world-class candidate experience. 

-Ensure every hire is a "culture-add" that aligns with our core mission. 



Strategy & Systems  

-Design and implement the overarching Talent Strategy for the next 3 years. 

-Build SOPs for workforce planning, competency mapping, and performance reviews. 

-Ensure effective hiring standards through automation and data-driven systems. 



Retention & Culture  

-Design and lead engagement initiatives to ensure industry-leading Talent Retention. 

-Establish career pathing, growth frameworks, and accountability structures. 

-Monitor organizational health and resolve culture complexities with proactive systems. 



Who You Are  

-15+ years in Talent Acquisition, People Ops, or Talent Strategy roles. 

-Experience in fast-moving agencies, consulting, or technology businesses. 

-Strong systems thinker (you understand that retention is a process, not a feeling). 

-Proven ability to build talent structures in remote, global environments. 

-Comfortable managing diverse, distributed teams across multiple time zones. 



What Makes You a Great Fit  

-You take ownership, not just direction. 

-You are an operator first, recruiter second. 

-You thrive in building new systems from scratch, not just maintaining old ones. 

-You bring clarity and human connection where there is complexity. 

-You want to build a world-class team that defines the future of the company. 



Location * Fully remote (global) 



Compensation * Competitive (based on experience) 



Why Join * Work directly with the founder on scaling a global company. 



-Take full ownership of the Talent & Culture department. 

-Build the human infrastructure that impacts businesses worldwide. 



How to Apply Please apply with: 

-A short note on why your background in Hiring, Strategy, and Retention fits PTOE Global Solutions. 

-A brief example of a talent system or retention initiative you built or improved. 

-Your location and expected compensation in local currency. 

 



*** Please include your resume with the number 2100 as the subject header, along with outlining your relevant experience and qualifications to be considered for an interview. ***

title: Senior Ecommerce Paid Media Specialist (Google + Meta) – Remote, Full-Time (AU Hours)
description:
Join Search Results

We’re hiring a senior paid media specialist who knows how to grow ecommerce brands, not just manage ad accounts.

This role is for someone with strong hands-on experience running Google Ads and Meta Ads for Shopify stores, with a proven track record of scaling budgets, increasing sales, and maintaining profitable performance as accounts grow.

We want a real operator — someone who can build, optimise, troubleshoot, and scale campaigns across multiple ecommerce clients while staying focused on growth and commercial outcomes.

What You’ll Be Doing

Build, manage, and optimise paid campaigns across Google Ads and Meta Ads for ecommerce clients

Run and improve Shopping, Performance Max, Search, YouTube, dynamic product ads, prospecting, and retargeting campaigns

Set up and maintain Shopify product feeds, pixels, CAPI, catalogues, audiences, and conversion tracking

Monitor account performance daily and make proactive changes to improve ROAS, CPA, MER, and revenue

Test creatives, landing pages, offers, audience structures, and bidding strategies

Work with our team on growth strategy, reporting, and account opportunities

Identify performance issues early and fix them fast

Stay on top of changes across Meta, Google, Shopify, tracking, and attribution

What We Need From You

5+ years of strong hands-on paid media experience

Proven experience running ads for Shopify ecommerce brands

Deep working knowledge of Google Ads across Search, Shopping, Performance Max, and YouTube

Deep working knowledge of Meta Ads across prospecting, retargeting, dynamic product ads, and creative testing

Strong understanding of GA4, GTM, pixel setup, CAPI, product feeds, attribution, and conversion tracking

Proven ability to scale ecommerce ad accounts to larger budgets and higher sales volumes

Strong English and the ability to communicate strategy, results, and recommendations clearly

Able to work independently, think critically, and take ownership of results

You Must Be Able To Show

The largest monthly ad budget you have personally managed

Examples of accounts you have scaled to bigger budgets and bigger sales volumes

How you increased spend while maintaining or improving performance

The actions you personally took to drive growth

Clear understanding of the commercial side of ecommerce performance, not just platfor
trics

Bonus If You Have

Experience with Klaviyo or
/SMS retargeting integrations

Experience managing multiple ecommerce brands or agency clients

Strong understanding of profitability, contribution margin, and customer acquisition economics

This Role Is For You If

You care about growth, revenue, and profitable scale

You know how to spot wasted spend quickly

You can confidently manage larger budgets without losing control of performance

You can explain results clearly without fluff

You’ve genuinely helped ecommerce brands grow

This Role Is Not For You If

You’ve mainly worked in lead gen and only touched ecommerce lightly

You rely heavily on platform recommendations without real strategic thinking

You struggle with tracking, feed issues, or attribution

You’ve maintained campaigns but have not genuinely scaled budgets and sales

Why Join Us?

100% remote work

Paid sick days and annual leave

Performance-based incentives and regular pay reviews

Loyalty bonus for long-term tea
mbers

Career development and upskilling opportunities

Collaborative and supportive digital team culture

How To Apply

Please send your resume and include real examples of accounts you have scaled.

In your application, tell us:

the largest monthly budget you have personally managed

the largest ecommerce sales volume you have helped support through paid ads

what platforms were involved

your starting budget vs scaled budget

the revenue outcome

your ROAS / CPA / MER before and after

exactly what you did to help achieve that growth

Applications without clear examples of scaling budgets and revenue may not be considered.

title: Project Coordinator (Construction/Admin Focus)
description:
Job Overview



The Project Administrator will provide administrative and organizational support to the Operations Team throughout all stages of project execution. This role plays a key part in ensuring documentation, communication, and tracking processes are accurate, timely, and well-managed.



Core Responsibilities

Support the Operations Team with administrative tasks across all project phases, including setup, execution, and closeout

Prepare and maintain accurate project documentation (RFIs, submittals, transmittals, purchase orders, and completion records)

Assist in updating project schedules, daily reports, and progress logs to keep timelines on track

Organize and track communication with clients, vendors, and subcontractors for proper documentation and follow-ups

Maintain and verify records of material deliveries, job costs, and time reports to ensure accuracy

Coordinate subcontractor requirements (insurance, W-9s, safety documents) and ensure compliance

Support meetings by preparing agendas, taking notes, and sharing action items

Assist with change orders, cost tracking, and reporting under supervision

Keep project files organized (digital and physical) for easy access and recordkeeping

Provide support during project closeout, including final documentation and warranty files

Required Qualifications / Skills

At least 3 years of administrative support experience (construction industry preferred)

Strong proficiency in Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, Outlook, SharePoint)

Excellent organization and attention to detail, especially in document control

Ability to manage multiple tasks and deadlines in a fast-paced environment

Strong communication skills and ability to work with different teams and stakeholders

Familiarity with construction terminology and documentation processes is a plus

Experience in creating and managing forms and structured documents

Reliable, proactive, and responsive to time-sensitive tasks

Preferred / Bonus Skills

Background in Business Administration, Construction Management, or a related field (preferred but not required)

Experience with project tracking systems or procurement processes

Work Hours & Time Zone

Full-time, Monday to Friday

Working hours: 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM CST (Central Time)

Additional Information



We use Hubstaff internally for productivity tracking. If you are someone who is open to working with this tool, we would love to have you on our team.



Please send updated link to your resume and record a 60-90 seconds intro video talking about your experience with the role we are looking for.

mber with relevant listing optimization & copywriting experience to join us to build the company together

title: Customer Service & Amazon/Temu Admin Specialist
description:
Customer Service & Amazon/Temu Admin Specialist

Full-Time | 40 hrs/week | Remote (Philippines)



About Us

Big Warehouse Refurbs is a fast-growing Australian eCommerce business specialising in refurbished tech — laptops, robot vacuums, electronics, and AV equipment. We sell across multiple marketplaces and we're scaling hard. We need a sharp, experienced operator to help us grow our Amazon AU and Temu presence while keeping our customer service tight.



The Role

This is a dual-focus position — half marketplace admin, half customer service. You'll be a key part of a lean team with real ownership of what you manage. If you're experienced, proactive, and know your way around Seller Central and Temu's portal, this is a great long-term opportunity.



What You'll Be Doing



Managing and optimising Amazon Seller Central listings (titles, bullets, backend keywords, pricing, inventory)

Handling Temu seller portal operations — listings, orders, and performance monitoring

Responding to customer enquiries and disputes across platforms with professionalism and speed

Managing cases, returns, A-to-Z claims, and escalations

Working across marketplace messaging platforms (Amazon, Temu, eBay etc.) and contributing to building the tools and processes around them

Flagging issues and reporting back to the owner with solutions, not just problems





What We're Looking For



Proven hands-on experience with Amazon Seller Central — this is non-negotiable

Experience with Temu's seller platform is a strong advantage

Solid customer service background in eCommerce (returns, disputes, and claims), with experience developing and creating systems, templates, and SOPs to make CS operations scalable

title: Online English/World History Teachers (Near-Native Accent)
description:
bout Pomelo Academy

Pomelo Academy is an innovative online international school dedicated to delivering high-quality education to students worldwide. We provide a dynamic and engaging learning environment, offering individualized instruction that transcends geographical boundaries.



Job Description

We are seeking passionate and experienced near-native English-speaking online teachers with strong backgrounds in English and/or World History. Candidates may specialize in one subject (English or History) or be able to teach both. The ideal teachers will have experience working with young learners and be committed to creating a supportive and engaging online classroom.



Responsibilities

• Provide instruction in English and/or World History to individuals and small groups of 2–6 students aged 5–18.

• Utilize international-standard curricula.

• Create and deliver engaging lesson plans tailored to each student’s needs.

• Monitor and assess student progress, providing regular feedback to students and parents.

• Foster a positive and encouraging learning environment.



Qualifications

• Professional teacher with at least 2 years of teaching experience (Kindergarten–Grade 12) and verifiable teaching certifications such as TESOL, TEFL, etc.

• Near-native English accent.

• Strong academic background in English and/or World History (additional experience in Science/Economics is a plus).

• Ability to work between 17:00–22:00 (Weekdays) and 09:00–22:00 (Weekends) GMT+8.

• Experience teaching in public/international schools.

• Skilled at working with young learners aged 5–18

• Familiarity with ClassIn and digital literacy (Microsoft Suite and other educational platforms).

• Must have a stable and fast internet connection and a PC/laptop with at least Windows 10/Mac OS Catalina.



Benefits

• Flexible working hours.

• Opportunity to teach using internationally recognized curricula.

• Work with an international team of educators.

• Professional development and training opportunities.

• Regular enrollment system (not booking-based), ensuring a stable and consistent teaching schedule.

title: Quality Assurance & Operations Administrator
description:
Position Summary

OPA Home Care operates a strict, gated Referral-to-Cash Operating System (v2.2) designed to

deliver consistent outcomes regardless of who executes the process. Every stage has one

owner, binary “done” definitions recorded in AxisCare, mandatory QA audits, and clear KPIs.

OPA has maintained a perfect shift coverage record – zero missed shifts since May 23, 2024.

As our Quality Assurance & Operations Administrator, you will execute daily audits, enforce

gate compliance, and produce reporting that keeps the pipeline running with discipline and

integrity. You will own the audit function across all active pipeline stages and escalate violations

without delay.



Important: This role involves reviewing client records that may contain Protected Health

Information (PHI). HIPAA training is required and must be completed before AxisCare

access is granted. No exceptions.



Key Responsibilities

Core QA & Audit Ownership



• Perform the full Stage 1 QA Audit within 24 hours of every Referral ? Intake completion

– verifying lead entry timestamps, contact cadence, SLA execution while client is on the

phone, deposit calculation and posting, gate integrity, referral source entry in both

required AxisCare locations, and Director of Operations start authorization.

• Expand QA audits to additional stages (Intake ? Care Plan, Staffing, Visit Completion,

Billing, and Recruiting pipeline) as those stages are finalized and directed.

• Track stage completion misses by employee and stage. Support corrective action by

reporting misses to the task owner and Director of Operations within 24 hours of

identification.

• Own the Exception Tracking Protocol: confirm every gate bypass is logged with all four

required fields (exception type, reason, approved-by, normalization deadline) and

normalized by the applicable deadline – 24 hours for emergency starts, 48 hours for gate

overrides. Escalate missed normalizations immediately.

• Run weekly cross-pipeline reviews and support root-cause analysis when lag KPIs fail.

• Deliver daily audit summaries and weekly pipeline reports to the Director of Operations,

CEO, and designated tea
mbers. Flag gate violations immediately – no batching of

critical issues.



Operations Support

• Monitor AxisCare continuously for gate integrity, status accuracy, medically fragile

designations, documentation compliance, and system rule adherence.

• Enforce core system rules without exception: one owner per stage, no downstream

action before gate confirmation, “if it is not logged in AxisCare, it did not happen,” and no

informal modifications.

• Support scheduling, intake, clinical, and billing teams with repeatable administrative and

auditing tasks as directed by the Director of Operations.



Compliance & Reporting

• Maintain strict HIPAA compliance in all work involving client data, at all times.

• Produce clear, accurate, and timely audit reports and documentation.

• Participate in process improvement as the company scales and additional OS stages are

activated.



Success Metrics

• 100% of assigned QA audits completed within required timeframes.

• 100% of exceptions normalized by deadline or escalated with documented reason

before deadline.

• Zero unaddressed critical issues in audit reports – all gate violations flagged same day.

• Reporting delivered on schedule with no gaps.

• Contribution to overall pipeline KPIs: conversion rates, shift coverage, collection rates.



Qualifications

• 2+ years of experience in quality assurance, process auditing, operations coordination,

or healthcare administration. Home care, BPO, or healthcare support experience is a

strong advantage.

• Demonstrated attention to detail and documented ability to enforce strict processes and

rules – including escalating when colleagues are non-compliant.

• Strong proficiency with EMR/EHR or care management systems. AxisCare experience is

highly preferred; fast independent learners will be considered.

• Excellent written and spoken English – clear, professional, and precise in all

communications.

• Reliable high-speed internet, power backup, and a quiet dedicated workspace for US

night-shift hours.

• Experience with HIPAA or equivalent data privacy standards. Candidates without prior

HIPAA experience must complete comprehensive training before system access is

granted.

• Comfortable working independently with a high degree of self-direction while

coordinating with a US-based team via Slack,
, and scheduled calls.



Preferred

• Background in home care, senior care, or healthcare BPO operations.

• Experience creating structured audit summaries and operational reports.

• Familiarity with US healthcare compliance environments or payer operations (VA,

Medicaid, private pay).



Compensation & Benefits

• Monthly salary: $1,200 – $1,400 USD depending on experience. Performance bonus

bridges toward higher earnings for strong and consistent performers.

• Paid training on OPA’s Operating System, AxisCare, and HIPAA – completed before

system access is granted.

• Opportunity to grow into expanded audit and operations scope as the company scales.



Why Join OPA?

You will play a foundational role in protecting a rigorous, systems-driven operation that delivers

exceptional reliability to clients and families. OPA has maintained zero missed shifts since May

23, 2024 – a record this role directly protects. If you are process-oriented, thrive on detail and

consistency, and want to contribute to a growing US home care company while working

remotely from the Philippines, this role is built for you.

title: Google VEO3 Specialist
description:
We’re Hiring: Google Veo 3 Specialist



Our fast-growing e-commerce brand is scaling toward 8-figures and beyond, and we’re ready to level up our creative production with the power of Google Veo 3. We’re looking for a Google Veo 3 Specialist to help us manage, refine, and execute AI-generated video ads that support our marketing goals.



To show you’ve carefully read this post, please start your response with the word peach before introducing yourself. Below, you’ll find the key responsibilities, requirements, and a few quick questions so we can get to know your experience.



Key Responsibilities:

- Prompt Creation & Optimization: Write, test, and refine prompts to generate high-quality video ads using Google Veo 3.

- Workflow Coordination: Manage the full AI production pipeline—concept to final output—ensuring deadlines are met.

- Creative Alignment: Collaborate with our marketing and UGC teams to blend AI-generated content with human-made assets.

- Quality Review: Ensure all outputs are polished, on-brand, and ready for launch.

- Innovation & Mastery: Stay up to date with Google Veo 3 features, updates, and best practices to keep us ahead of the curve.

- Documentation: Maintain a clear system for tracking prompts, revisions, and final deliverables.



Requirements:

- Hands-on experience with Google Veo 3 and AI video generation.

- Strong organizational skills and attention to detail.

- Ability to manage multiple creative projects at once.

- Good communication skills for working with both AI and human creators.

- Comfortable using project management tools like Google Sheets, Notion, or similar.

- Consistent availability for 4-8 hours daily, 6 days per week.

- Bonus: Background in marketing, video production, or AI prompt engineering.



Questions for You:

- Have you worked directly with Google Veo 3 before? If so, tell us about your projects.

- How do you approach prompt testing and refining to get the best results?

- What’s your system for keeping multiple AI video projects organized?

- Are you comfortable balancing both creative expectations and technical workflows?

- Can you commit to 4-8 hours per day, 6 days per week, for this role?



If you’re passionate about AI-powered creativity and love working with cutting-edge tools like Google Veo 3, we’d love to hear from you!

title: E-Commerce Buyer / Sourcer
description:
About Us:



We are a fast-growing UK e-commerce company selling international grocery products across Amazon, eBay, Shopify, TikTok Shop, and Temu, processing 10,000+ parcels per week.



We are hiring a Buyer / Sourcer to research new products and suppliers, prepare purchase orders, and make commercial decisions that impact profitability. This is not an admin role - your thinking matters more than your typing speed.



Full training provided. You do not need e-commerce or buying experience to apply.



Key Responsibilities:

* Research and identify new products and potential suppliers.

* Prepare purchase orders based on sales data, stock levels, and lead times.

* Assess whether suppliers and products are a commercial fit for the business.

* Use AI-powered tools to analyse sales velocity, margins, and stock cover.

* Communicate your reasoning clearly to management.



Requirements:

* Strong research skills and ability to evaluate information critically.

* Good written and spoken English.

* Clear communicator who can explain their decision-making.

* Self-starter who investigates before acting.

* Comfortable learning to work with data.

* Must be available to work Monday to Friday, 2:00 PM - 11:00 PM PHT (6:00 AM - 3:00 PM GMT) with a 1 hour lunch break. These hours are not flexible.

* Professional webcam/audio setup and reliable internet.



Compensation:

* Php 32,500/month (paid bi-weekly), review to Php 37,500 at 3 months based on performance.

* Pro-rated 13th-month pay.

* Fast career development with direct mentorship from the Office Manager.



Apply at 
/careers

title: Commenting on Ads on META (Instagram & Facebook) with newly created, authentic profiles
description:
???? Your Task 

We are looking for a reliable person to write authentic comments under our ads (videos & images) on
 & Instagram, which we will provide. These are to be carried out with newly created, fake profiles that match the target audience.

The task is therefore to create new profiles on
 & Instagram that appear authentic and real, match the target audience, and use them to comment under the posts. This is intended to generate more engagement and more social proof under the ads.



???? Your Tasks in Detail

Create multiple authentic profiles from the German-speaking region that look real (profile picture, biography, friends list, some posts, etc.) ? using the appropriate IP/VPN from e.g. Germany

Writing natural, authentic comments (a list will be provided by us, you do not need to write your own comments)

Regular commenting under various content (recurring tasks)

Implementation of given comments and requirements

You also ensure engagement on questions in the comments (own initiative) & create discussions and conversations within the comments



???? You receive:

A structured list of comments (incl. links to the ads)

Regular new tasks / products



???? Your Profile

You can create multiple authentic social media profiles that appear genuine and real

You know how to use VPN/IP addresses for the relevant target country

Your created profiles look realistic and fitting to a clear target group (e.g. through bio, profile picture, activity)

You have a good sense for natural communication (conversations in the comments for engagement ? own initiative)

You can phrase comments the way real users would write them

You work reliably and implement requirements in a structured way



???? Important for the Collaboration

Comments should appear genuine and be individually phrased

Orientation towards our requirements & examples is important

The goal is a realistic and credible representation of user opinions



???? Long-term Collaboration

Possibility to receive regular new orders

Recurring tasks (multiple commenting over time)

Building a long-term collaboration with good performance



???? What we offer you

Flexible remote work

Simple, clearly structured tasks

Regular projects

Fair Salary per number of comments



?? Process

We have a call & briefly discuss whether you are suitable for this task

You receive access to a list with comments, content & requirements

You create several different, authentic & approachable profiles according to the target group & specifications with appropriate VPN/IP address

You independently comment on the posts & ads from the list we provide, according to the specifications

You repeat this process regularly for new content (the list will then also be updated regularly)



?? Apply Now Send us:

A brief introduction of yourself, your experience & skills in relation to this job

Info on whether you already use profiles or can create new ones that meet our requirements

Availability & time
